data.body:
if in a git repo, and hooks are already installed, don't show that stupid message. 

cartine@adrian:~/collector$ kno doctor
Doctor
lock_health:  ✓ repo/cache locks are acquirable
   worktree:  ✓ knots worktree is clean
     remote:  ✓ origin reachable; knots branch exists
    version:  ⚠ update available: v0.7.6 -> v0.11.0 (run `kno upgrade`)
      hooks:  ✓ sync hooks installed
kno doctor --fix to address these items
cartine@adrian:~/collector$ kno doctor --fix
          kno  /home/cartine/.local/bin/kno
       compat  /home/cartine/.local/bin/knots
      version  kno 0.11.0
  completions  /home/cartine/.local/share/bash-completion/completions/kno
Upgrade
status:  updated kno binary
  hint:  run `kno hooks install` to update hook templates
Doctor
lock_health:  ✓ repo/cache locks are acquirable
   worktree:  ✓ knots worktree is clean
     remote:  ✓ origin reachable; knots branch exists
    version:  ✓ upgrade applied in this run; restart and rerun `kno doctor`
      hooks:  ✓ sync hooks installed
cartine@adrian:~/collector$
data.title: kno upgarde says "hint: run hooks install. ..." even when hooks are installed
